ops.text: Resolution sweep (v2 quality-restoration W0, 2026-07-14): the SKILL.md `trip set` example papercut (2026-07-13T23:05) and the unreachable `max_finalists` read are both fixed at HEAD — the docs C4 commit rewrote the example to PLAN_KEYS-valid keys, and `max_finalists`/`maxFinalists` grep 0 matches tree-wide (factors.py now uses PRESENTATION_LIMIT). The exit-3 papercut (2026-07-14T03:18) and window-miss papercut (2026-07-14T05:25) are scheduled as wave W4 of the approved fix plan; the fli OKA/NAH items remain upstream (punitarani/fli#131).
